TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr-frogstory_angai

S.FORM: miana ’una kaan tacin manu ah Pori kaan ah nganai in.
S.TRANSL: 從前，有一個小孩，名字是Pori。
In the past, there was a kid named Pori.

S.FORM: uh ’una nipapacʉvʉrʉ kee takarura mataa ’una tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 養了青蛙和小狗。
(he) kept a frog and a puppy.

S.FORM: eh cʉ’ʉrʉʉn kee sua uh nipapacʉvʉrʉ kee sua takarura.
S.TRANSL: 看到所飼養的青蛙。
(He) saw the frog he kept.

S.FORM: ’esi nia kangvang sua ta ʉncoo tamtitu ’esi porun.
S.TRANSL: 小狗都在那邊一直叫。
The puppy was barking there.

S.FORM: sua Pori kisʉʉn mataa nguain tamna tamtitu arakukun si’icʉpʉ.
S.TRANSL: Pori和她的小狗一起睡覺。
Pori and his puppy slept together.

S.FORM: mesua ia sua kavangvang nguain tamna tikuru mataa nguain tamna carapung sua nipapacʉvʉrʉ kee.
S.TRANSL: 當時，他的所有衣服、帽子和所養的
Then, all his clothes, hat, and what he fed…

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo takaruru ia ’esi tisikara na pupunga pania.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙在竹製的瓶子裡面。
The frog was in the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: ʉ sh acuu si si’icʉpʉ ’aan tavarʉ’ʉ sua ʉncoo takarura ia ’eseva niarapapining tia manguru.
S.TRANSL: 嗯，在睡覺，不知道青蛙要逃到外面。
Well, (he) was sleeping, not knowing the frog was going to escape to outside.

S.FORM: ʉ mee aratakarʉ nguain cʉmʉ’ʉra sua ʉncoo takarura na ’esi ni na ʉncoo pania.
S.TRANSL: 當他起來時，看到青蛙在瓶子裏面。
When he stood up, he saw the frog was in the bottle.

S.FORM: mataa tiki tikirim kee na ʉncoo sapuarʉ.
S.TRANSL: 然後，找網子。
Then, (he) looked for a net.

S.FORM: ’esi kara nimitʉvʉng ’inia sua.
S.TRANSL: 他躲在那邊嗎?
Did it hide there?

S.FORM: makasua sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia ’esi arisovuun kee sua pania ʉ pupunga.
S.TRANSL: 之後，他的小狗聞竹製的瓶子。
Afterwards, his dog smelt the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: ’esi kara tisikara ’inia?.
S.TRANSL: 有在裡面嗎?
Was it inside there?

S.FORM: ʉ na ʉncoo tapcara sinʉva.
S.TRANSL: 在門的上面。
(It’s) above the door.

S.FORM: tarakusa pipining ʉ cumacʉ’ʉra tikirim.
S.TRANSL: (狗)向外面看，尋找(青蛙)。
(The dog) looked toward outside, looking for (the frog).

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo nguain tamna tamtitu ia ha’au koo ’aan tavarʉ’ʉ ’esi na navung in sua ʉncoo ʉ pupunga ah pania.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗不知道他的頭在竹製的瓶子裡。
His dog didn’t know his head was in the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: makasua cu nimatapari’i na aranai na tapcaraa sinʉva makasi na ’ʉnʉ’ʉnai matapari’i ʉ manasʉ musukom.
S.TRANSL: (狗)從門的上面掉到地上，可能很痛。
(The dog) fell from the door to the ground. It perhaps got hurt.

S.FORM: ʉ maris marisari eh sii manasʉ musukom.
S.TRANSL: (狗)可能因為痛而叫。
(The dog) barked perhaps because it hurt.

S.FORM: acuu nim uh niarapurupuru sua ʉncoo pania pupunga.
S.TRANSL: (狗)打破了竹製的瓶子。
(The dog) broke the bamboo bottle.

S.FORM: eh makasua cu acuu pipining tarakusa ʉncoo na aracen.
S.TRANSL: 之後，(狗)到外面望向遠方。
Afterwards, (the dog) went outside, looking far away.

S.FORM: tikikirim sua nguain tamna ʉ nipapacʉvʉra takarura.
S.TRANSL: 他一直尋找他養的青蛙。
He kept looking for the frog he kept.

S.FORM: uh tarakusa sua tacau na ʉncoo kakangca.
S.TRANSL: 狗望向天空。
The dog looked at the sky.

S.FORM: kacaua sua ʉncoo ucucu ’esi minganingani.
S.TRANSL: 很多虎頭蜂一直飛。
Many hornets were flying.

S.FORM: uh makasua cu uh tarakusa na ʉncoo uh karu tatia ’una sua tarako ’inia.
S.TRANSL: 之後，(小孩)望向大樹，那邊有洞。
Then, (The kid) looked to the big tree. There was a hole.

S.FORM: uh mokusa cu na nguain se na ʉncoo karu tatia eh mopara ah tarakusa na ʉncoo tarako karu.
S.TRANSL: 他走去大樹，爬上去看樹洞。
He went to the big tree and climbed up to see the hole.

S.FORM: ’esi kara nia sua cʉpʉngʉ in ia ’esi kara nia sua ʉ takarura mitʉvʉʉng.
S.TRANSL: 他想，青蛙有沒有躲在那邊?
he thought if the frog hid there.

S.FORM: eh tarakusa nia sua manu cumacʉ’ʉra ’esi kara nia ’esi kara tisi kara nia sua ʉncoo takarura ʉ mitʉvʉʉng.
S.TRANSL: 小孩望向那裏看，不曉得青蛙有沒有躲在裡面?
The kid looked inside, wandering if the frog hid inside.

S.FORM: sua nguain tamna tamtitu ia ’esi porun porunun kee sua ucucu nimitatin na karu.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗在對吊在樹上的虎頭蜂吠叫。
His dog was barking at the hornet hung on the tree.

S.FORM: ʉ makasua cu ʉ tarakusa nia sua manu sua pori kisʉʉn.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣，叫做Pori的小孩望著那裏。
This way, the kid called Pori looked there.

S.FORM: ʉ cʉmʉ’ʉra ah ucucuava sua nimitatin ’esi cu arapipining sua coin.
S.TRANSL: 看到原來是虎頭蜂吊掛在那裏而且虎頭蜂的夥伴已經出來了。
(He) saw that a hornet just hung there and its fellows had come out.

S.FORM: ʉ ma’icʉpʉ cu nguain arapipining sua ʉ tumang sua manu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子怕到了而哭出來了。
The kid was scared and cried.

S.FORM: ʉ umanguru sua ʉncoo um manu ʉ muparu na ʉncoo karu tarakusa na ʉncoo tarako ʉ karu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩逃跑，爬到樹上，望著樹洞。
The kid fled, climing up the tree and looking at the hole.

S.FORM: cʉmʉ’ʉra ’esi kara tisikaren sua ’esi kara tisikaren sua ʉ takarura.
S.TRANSL: 看著青蛙有沒有在(樹)洞裡面。
(he) saw if the frog was in the (tree) hole.

S.FORM: ʉ sua ʉncoo tonging ia tarakusa ’inia nen sua ʉncoo ’esi tikirimi manu isi?.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠呢，望著他(小孩)，這個小孩(究竟)在找什麼?
As for the mouse, (it) looked at the kid, thinking what he was looking for.

S.FORM: rakicacʉ sua manu matapari’i.
S.TRANSL: 小孩受到驚嚇而掉下來。
The kid was scared and fell down.

S.FORM: sua nguain tamna nipapacʉvʉra sua ʉncoo tacau ia ʉncoo tamtitu ia ’esi parikuun ucucu tia ʉncoo rumaresi.
S.TRANSL: 他所飼養的狗，那隻小狗被虎頭蜂追著，要去咬(狗)。
The dog he kept, it was chased by the hornets that would bite (the dog).

S.FORM: makasua cu rapapining sua ʉncoo ʉ mingane sua ʉncoo puka arapapining ’esi arakicacʉ sua ʉncoo ʉ manu ah Pori kisʉʉn uh minitʉvʉng na ʉncoo ʉ sanvalia vatu.
S.TRANSL: 之後，貓頭鷹飛出來，嚇到那位躲在石頭後面叫做Pori小孩子。
Afterwards, the owl flew out and scared the kid called Pori who hid behind the stone.

S.FORM: ʉ sua nguain tamna tamtitu ia niaratakarʉ ’esi poruruun kee sua ʉncoo vutun ah ’esi na kukuca vatu.
S.TRANSL: 他的小狗站起來了，對著在石頭後面的鹿吠叫。
His god stood up, barking at the dear behind the stone.

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo ʉncoo vutun ia niaratakarʉ sii rakicacʉ niaratakarʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿因為受到驚嚇而站起來了。
The dear stood up because it got scared.

S.FORM: ua nipusa’an kee na navungi in sua ʉncoo u’ungu in uh nimaca’a u’ungu in sua ʉncoo manu uh arapana’ʉ manguru sii ’esi pora poruruun sua na tacau.
S.TRANSL: 牠把小孩扛在分叉的角跑走了，因為狗對著(鹿)吠叫。
It (the dear) carried the kid on its critched horn and ran away because the dog was barking (at the deer).

S.FORM: mataa ’esi manguru mataa ta tacau uh nimatapari’i na ʉncoo ah ’iti’itan matapari’i na ʉncoo cocanum.
S.TRANSL: 以及(牠)跟狗一起逃跑，掉落在懸崖、掉落在水源區。
And (it) ran away with the dog, falling off the cliffs and falling to the water.

S.FORM: hm makasua ah tarasangai.
S.TRANSL: 之後，就休息。
Then, (he) rested.

S.FORM: mee ’esi ’esi cu tarasangai ʉ eseva tinarasangai na ’una nimiravʉkʉ karu na ciciri uh cocanum.
S.TRANSL: 當休息了之後，他原來是停在水源區邊的倒塌的樹木。
After taking a rest, he just rested at the tree collapsing on the side of the water area.

S.FORM: ʉ taramanʉnge ’inia sua karu ia ’una tarako tarako tatia.
S.TRANSL: 他仔細看著(他休息的)那棵樹有洞，大的洞。
He saw that there was a big hole at the tree (at which he rested).

S.FORM: ’es makai tia ’una sovu sua ʉncoo takarura na ʉncoo takʉ uh tarako karu isi nimiravʉkʉ.
S.TRANSL: 好像有青蛙的味道在倒下來的樹洞裡面。
There seemed to have the frog’s smell coming out of the hole of the collapsed tree.

S.FORM: makasua cu nguain ʉ sii nimupacai ah nimupara na karu tatia ’esi tarasangai.
S.TRANSL: 他就這樣累了，爬到樹上在休息。
He was tired in that doing and climbed up to the tree to rest.

S.FORM: sua nguain tamna ʉncoo tamtitu ia ’esi tararorocu cumʉ cʉmʉ’ʉra ʉ ’eseva cʉ’ʉrʉʉn kee sua nguain tamna nipapacʉvʉra sua ʉncoo takarura.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗往下看，原來他在看他所養的那隻青蛙。
His dog looked down. He was looking at the frog he (the boy) kept.

S.FORM: makasua cu sua ʉncoo ʉ nguain tamna nipapacʉvʉra ʉ tongin ia tia ’aan sua ʉncoo ta takarura ia uh kacaua cu nguain tamna ah tangria arakukun na sumasima’ʉ na uh cocanum.
S.TRANSL: 那時，他所養的兩隻老鼠，啊不是，是青蛙結伴更多的朋友在水中一起玩。
Then, the two muses he kept, no, frog, accompanied more friends to have fun the the water.

S.FORM: ʉ mesua ia te cu eh pue’i paca’e nia nguain tamna tak takarura te cu uh tia pue’i uh tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 那時，他要回家，他就抓了他的青蛙回家。
At that time, he was going home. He captured his frog, going home.

S.FORM: umavici sua takarur en te cu uh ’esi uh avicin kee ’apacʉvʉrʉ uh masikusa na ʉncoo ʉncoo kacaua takarura uh matʉnsʉ kia’e nuari.
S.TRANSL: 那時，他就抓了所養的青蛙，向著很多隻的青蛙說咱們改天再見。
Then, he captured the frog he kept, tuning to the many frogs and saying “See you later.”

S.FORM: uh sua ikamu ia monanga sian ’apacʉ’ʉrʉ kee nuari ’apacʉ’ʉra kee uh nouare.
S.TRANSL: 你們在這裡安頓好，我們將來再相見。
Settle yourselves here. We will meet in the future.

S.FORM: sua ʉncoo po’ʉ’ʉna isi nguaci sua kari.
S.TRANSL: 那個，討論這個故事，(我的)話到此。
Well, talking about the story, My words stop here.
